name: resqmesh
description: ResQMesh – Resilient Mesh Emergency Response System

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../admin-dashboard && npm install
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
